arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AWS Connect instance.

auto_resolve_best_voices_enabled.description: Indicates if the feature to automatically select the best voice is enabled.

contact_flow_logs_enabled.description: Indicates if logging for contact flows is enabled.

contact_lens_enabled.description: Indicates if the Contact Lens feature is enabled for the instance.

created_time.description: The time when the AWS Connect instance was created.

early_media_enabled.description: Indicates if early media is enabled, allowing callers to hear media before the call is connected.

id.description: The unique identifier for the AWS Connect instance.

identity_management_type.description: The type of identity management used by the AWS Connect instance.

inbound_calls_enabled.description: Indicates if the instance is configured to handle inbound calls.

instance_alias.description: The alias or name assigned to the AWS Connect instance.

instance_id.description: The identifier for the AWS Connect instance.

multi_party_conference_enabled.description: Indicates if multi-party conference calls are enabled.

outbound_calls_enabled.description: Indicates if the instance is configured to handle outbound calls.

service_role.description: The service role associated with the AWS Connect instance.

status.description: The current status of the AWS Connect instance.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the AWS Connect instance.
